raw_text: Got a WhatsApp from someone claiming to be HDFC asking for my OTP and card number. Link looks fake.
Power outage on Link Road since 6pm. BEST utility says 2 more hours. Affects Andheri West.
The WiFi in this building is SO slow again, third time this week. Management does nothing!!
Bike stolen from outside D-Mart around 11am. Dark blue Honda Activa MH02. Please keep an eye out.
Received SMS: 'Your KYC is expired, click here to update or your account will be suspended'. Classic scam.
Minor flooding near the subway exit after heavy rain this morning. Watch your step.
Fire reported at building near MG Road metro station. Fire department on scene. Evacuate area.
Anyone else's internet been down all day? My provider is useless. Been without connection since morning.
Local police arrested 3 people involved in ATM skimming near the mall. Devices removed from all ATMs in the area.
I heard something happened at the market but no one knows what. Probably nothing important.
Massive traffic jam on NH8 after accident. 5 vehicles involved. Avoid area, divert traffic from Ring Road.
AAAHHH THIS IS SO FRUSTRATING I HATE EVERYTHING ABOUT THIS NEIGHBORHOOD THE STREETS ARE TERRIBLE AND NOBODY CARES WHAT IS EVEN HAPPENING HERE
Suspicious package left near bank branch on Park Street. Police have cordoned off the area. Do not approach.
Maybe something happened near the school but I'm not sure. My friend's friend said something but I don't remember what exactly.
Phishing email received claiming to be from SBI asking to verify account. Never click such links!
Heavy rainfall causing waterlogging on several streets. Municipal corporation has deployed pumps. Avoid low-lying areas.
Local cybercrime cell warns of new malware targeting banking apps. Update your apps from official stores only.
I think maybe there might be a scam going around but honestly I'm not too sure about the details lol
Car accident on Outer Ring Road near Silk Board junction. Two cars involved, one person injured. Ambulance en route.
Building evacuation drill completed successfully. All residents safely accounted for in 12 minutes.
Robbers attempted break-in at jewelry store on MG Road at 2:30 AM. Security guards present. Police investigating.
Medical college hospital reports power backup failures. Operations postponed. Electrical contractor working on repairs.
Earthquake tremors felt. Epicenter 45km away. No damage reported. Seismic monitoring teams on alert.
Protest march scheduled for tomorrow at 10am. Main roads closure expected. Avoid peak hour commute.
School bus accident near Tech Park. 2 students injured, airlifted to hospital. Investigation underway.
Counterfeit currency notes detected in market. People advised to check cash carefully. Report to police if found.
Data breach at e-commerce platform affects 5000 users. Passwords reset. Check email for security alert.
Water supply disruption in south zone for 6 hours. Municipal corporation conducting maintenance.
Workplace violence incident at corporate office. Person apprehended. Employee counseling arranged.
Construction crane collapse at ongoing site. 3 workers injured. OSHA investigation initiated.
